experience: Legal experience that protects your rights
provide: We provide legal representation and consulting services in the Kingdom with professionalism and confidentiality.
about: Empowering Your Ambitions Through Legal Excellence
about-p: Founded in 2013, Al-Shiddi Law Firm bridges international standards with local expertise. For over a decade, we have provided tailored counsel in M&A, Financing, and Digital Transformation, ensuring our clients navigate complex legal landscapes with absolute confidence.
corporate-p: Providing comprehensive services in company formation, drafting governance regulations, and managing M&As, with ongoing legal counsel to ensure business sustainability.
investment-p: Empowering investors by facilitating licensing procedures and structuring foreign and local investments in line with Saudi Vision 2030 for a secure investment environment.
saudi-p: Deep legal expertise in all regulations and bylaws applicable in the Kingdom, providing legal awareness and representation before authorities to protect national interests.
consulting-p: Providing proactive and innovative legal solutions tailored to face complex challenges in a changing business environment, focusing on precise advice for strategic decision-making.
risk-p: Identifying and evaluating potential legal threats facing your business, and developing effective preventive strategies to mitigate risks and ensure full regulatory compliance.
contracts-p: Preparing and drafting all types of commercial and civil contracts with extreme legal precision, ensuring the protection of our clients' rights and avoiding future disputes.
ai-p: Keeping pace with digital transformation by providing counsel on emerging technology frameworks and helping draft ethical AI policies that balance innovation with legal commitment.
cyber-p: Ensuring your entity's compliance with personal data protection and cybersecurity regulations, providing legal support against cybercrimes and protecting digital assets.
name: Full Name
